subcodes.first_line: This servant hath unceasingly made mention of the friends and summoned all unto the Most Exalted Horizon, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این عبد لازال اولیا را ذکر نموده و کل را بافق اعلی دعوت فرموده ولاکن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
